text.title: AI-Assisted Single-Interview Analysis Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use it when the input shape changes or before scaling a pilot.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this a single-interview analysis (not multi-interview synthesis)?

conclusion.verdict: Cannot run without transcript; arrange transcription first.
Run full analysis with researcher verification.
Halt at publication; do not release without verified_by.
